source:
gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd

upstream: should handle a inclusive end date definition
source:
gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
inclusiveEndDates

gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid

expect.title: Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid

source:
gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
title ;Gantt diagram titles support semicolons

gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
title #Gantt diagram titles support hashtags

upstream: should concatenate tokens across multiple excludes lines (issue #6270)
source:
gantt
dateFormat DD-MM-YYYY
excludes weekends
%% week 7 is winter break
excludes 10-02-2025 11-02-2025 12-02-2025
%% workers holiday 1 maj
excludes 01-05-2025

gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
excludes weekdays 2019-02-01
todayMarker off
notes: Parse-level only: the 'weekdays' exclude token makes the schedule unresolvable for us (see exclusions e1).

source:
gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
excludes weekdays 2019-02-01
section Documentation

gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
excludes weekdays 2019-02-01
section ;Documentation

gantt
dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
excludes weekdays 2019-02-01
section #Documentation

upstream: should handle multiline section titles with different line breaks
source:
gantt dateFormat yyyy-mm-dd title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid excludes weekdays 2019-02-01 section Line1
Line2
Line3
Line4
Line5

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
section Documentation
Design jison grammar:des1, 2014-01-01, 2014-01-04

upstream: should handle a task definition (hashtag label)
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
section Documentation
#Design jison grammar:des1, 2014-01-01, 2014-01-04

upstream: should handle a task with start/end time relative to other tasks
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
section Documentation
task A: a, 2024-01-27, 2024-01-28
task B: b, after a, 2024-01-30
task C: c, 2024-01-20, until a
task D: d, after c, until b
notes: The anchor case for until semantics: until X ends at X's start; after Y starts at Y's end.

upstream: should handle a task with tags milestone
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
section Documentation
test task:milestone, 2014-01-01, 2014-01-04

source:

test task:done, 2014-01-01, 2014-01-04

upstream: should handle a task with tags crit,milestone,done
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
title Adding gantt diagram functionality to mermaid
section Documentation
test task:crit,milestone,done, 2014-01-01, 2014-01-04

upstream: should parse callback specifier with no args
source:
gantt
dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
section Clickable
Visit mermaidjs           :active, cl1, 2014-01-07, 3d
Calling a callback        :cl2, after cl1, 3d

click cl1 href "https://mermaidjs.github.io/"
click cl2 call ganttTestClick()

upstream: should parse callback specifier with arbitrary number of args
source:
gantt
dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
section Clickable
Visit mermaidjs           :active, cl1, 2014-01-07, 3d
Calling a callback        :cl2, after cl1, 3d

click cl1 href "https://mermaidjs.github.io/"
click cl2 call ganttTestClick("test0", test1, test2)

upstream: should allow for a accessibility title and description (accDescr)
source:
gantt
       accTitle: Gantt Diagram
       accDescr: Tasks for Q4
       dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
       section Section
       A task :a1, 2014-01-01, 30d

upstream: should allow for a accessibility title and multiline description (accDescr)
source:
gantt
       accTitle: Gantt Diagram
       accDescr {
         Tasks for Q4 row1
row2
       }
       dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
       section Section
       A task :a1, 2014-01-01, 30d
notes: Normalized: upstream preserves the newline inside the block; our renderer-grade parser joins block lines with a space (the agent layer preserves the block verbatim as an opaque segment).

upstream: should allow for setting the starting weekday to monday for tick interval
source:
gantt
weekday monday

gantt
weekday tuesday

gantt
weekday wednesday

gantt
weekday thursday

gantt
weekday friday

gantt
weekday saturday

gantt
weekday sunday

upstream: should allow for a link to __proto__ id
source:
gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Section
    A task :__proto__, 2024-10-01, 3d
    click __proto__ href "https://mermaid.js.org/"
notes: Prototype-pollution guard: id tables are Maps, so reserved property names are safe task ids.

upstream: should allow for a link to constructor id
source:
gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Section
    A task :constructor, 2024-10-01, 3d
    click constructor href "https://mermaid.js.org/"

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
d1 :i1, 2013-01-01, 1d
d2 :i2, 2013-01-01, 2w
d3 :i3, 2013-01-01, 1ms
d4 :i4, 2013-01-01, 0.1s

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2013-01-12

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2d

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2h

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2m

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2s

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2w

upstream: should handle fixed dates without id
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :2013-01-01,2013-01-12
notes: Upstream synthesizes id 'task1'; we leave the Mermaid id undefined — assertions are index-based.

source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :2013-01-01,4d

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2w
test2 :id2,after id1,1d

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2w
test2 :after id1,1d

gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2w
test2 :2013-01-26
notes: A single metadata item is an END expression; the start is inherited from the previous task's end.

source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section testa1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2w
test2 :2d

gantt
dateFormat x
section testa1
test1 :id1,0,20ms
test2 :id2,after id1,5ms
section testa2
test3 :id3,20,10ms
test4 :id4,after id3,0.005s
notes: Upstream asserts these as UTC ISO strings — fully timezone-free, the cleanest parity case in their suite.

upstream: should handle relative start date based on id regardless of sections
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section sec1
test1 :id1,2013-01-01,2w
test2 :id2,after id3,1d
section sec2
test3 :id3,after id1,2d
notes: Forward references resolve in BOTH implementations (upstream loops; we resolve topologically).

upstream: should handle relative end date based on id regardless of sections
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section sec1
task1 :id1,2013-01-01,until id3
section sec2
task2 :id2,2013-01-10,until id3
task3 :id3,2013-02-01,2d

upstream: should handle relative start date based on multiple id
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section sec1
task1 :id1,after id2 id3 id4,1d
task2 :id2,2013-01-01,1d
task3 :id3,2013-02-01,3d
task4 :id4,2013-02-01,2d
notes: Starts at the LATEST referenced end (id3 ends 2013-02-04) → ends 02-05.

upstream: should handle relative end date based on multiple id
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section sec1
task1 :id1,2013-01-01,until id2 id3 id4
task2 :id2,2013-01-11,1d
task3 :id3,2013-02-10,1d
task4 :id4,2013-02-12,1d
notes: Ends at the EARLIEST referenced start.

upstream: should ignore weekends starting on friday
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
excludes weekends
weekend friday
section friday-saturday weekends skip test
test1 :id1,2024-02-28, 3d
notes: Friday+Saturday weekend; the task starts on a working Wednesday, where our exclude-walk and upstream's agree.

upstream: should not infinite loop when excluding everything
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
excludes weekends,monday,tuesday,wednesday,thursday,friday
weekend saturday
section weekends skip test
test1 :id1,2019-02-01,7d
notes: Upstream throws 'Failed to find a valid date'; both implementations refuse to loop forever.

upstream: should maintain the order in which tasks are created
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section section A section
Completed task :done,    des1, 2014-01-06,2014-01-08
Active task :active,  des2, 2014-01-09, 3d
Future task :des3, after des2, 5d
Future task2 :des4, after des3, 5d
section section Critical tasks
Completed task in the critical line :crit, done, 2014-01-06,24h
Implement parser and jison :crit, done, after des1, 2d
Create tests for parser :crit, active, 3d
Future task in critical line :crit, 5d
Create tests for renderer :2d
Add to mermaid :1d
section section Documentation
Describe gantt syntax :active, a1, after des1, 3d
Add gantt diagram to demo page :after a1  , 20h
Add another diagram to demo page :doc1, after a1  , 48h
section section Last section
Describe gantt syntax :after doc1, 3d
Add gantt diagram to demo page :20h
Add another diagram to demo page :48h
notes: Upstream's 16-task flagship: status tags, hour durations, implicit starts chaining through time-of-day instants, cross-section after refs. All pure date arithmetic — identical in both implementations.

upstream: should work when end date is the 31st
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
section Task endTime is on the 31st day of the month
test1 :id1,2019-09-30,11d
test2 :id2,after id1,20d

upstream: should automatically add one day to all end dates
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
inclusiveEndDates
test1 :id1,2019-02-01,1d
test2 :id2,2019-02-01,2019-02-03
notes: inclusiveEndDates affects explicit END DATES only (+1 day); durations are untouched.

source:
gantt
todayMarker stoke:stroke-width:5px,stroke:#00f,opacity:0.5
notes: The 'stoke' typo is upstream's own fixture text, vendored faithfully.

upstream: should reject dates with ridiculous years
source:
gantt
dateFormat YYYYMMDD
test1 :id1,202304,1d
notes: Upstream throws 'Invalid date:202304'; both implementations reject.

source:
gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Build
    Task A :a1, 2024-01-01, 3d
    Task B :b1, after a1, 2d
    Task C :c1, after b1, 1d

gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    Active Task  :active, a1, 2024-01-01, 3d
    Done Task    :done, d1, 2024-01-01, 2d
    Crit Task    :crit, c1, 2024-01-01, 4d
    Crit Done    :crit, done, cd1, 2024-01-01, 1d

gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    Task 1 :t1, 2024-06-15, 5d

gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    Task 1 :2024-01-01, 3d

gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    excludes weekends
    Task 1 :2024-01-01, 3d

gantt
    title A Gantt Diagram
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Section 1
    Task 1           :a1, 2024-01-01, 3d
    Task 2           :after a1, 2d
    section Section 2
    Task 3           :2024-01-02, 5d

gantt
  title Empty
notes: Both implementations refuse a task-less gantt at render time.

source:
%% comment
gantt
A :a, 2024-01-01, 1d

gantt
    title Project Plan
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Development
        Task A :a1, 2024-01-01, 14d
        Task B :b1, 2024-01-15, 14d

gantt
    title My Project
    section Work
        Task :t1, 2024-01-01, 7d
